candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets line.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total current assets label.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow closing cash line matches conceptually, but balance sheet is preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period
candidates.why: Beginning cash, not the balance-sheet end-of-period cash position.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash line as preferred.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Only a component of current liabilities, not the total.
Balancing line, not the reported total.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total current liabilities label.

candidates.why: Best match for short-term debt/current interest-bearing borrowings; excludes lease liabilities.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Also an exact conceptual match for current maturities of long-term debt excluding leases, but preview values are blank and likely not consistently populated.
Interest payable is not debt principal and should be excluded from STD.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: STD may be split across rows under IFRS. Selected short-term borrowings plus current portion of long-term debt excluding capitalized leases; lease liabilities were excluded. The second label is outside the shortlist in effective use due to blank previews, but semantically it is the correct non-lease current maturities line.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: Exact tax payable/current tax liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best available total/net PPE-style line on the balance sheet; preferable to individual gross/accumulated component rows.
Only one PPE component, not total PPE.
Only one PPE component, not total PPE.

variables.notes: Chose the reported aggregate tangible assets line as the closest balance-sheet equivalent to total/net PPE. This is preferred over summing component rows or using right-of-use asset lines.

candidates.why: Exact operating cash flow / net cash flow from operating activities line.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate was provided, but this is the exact cash-flow-from-operations label on the cash flow statement.
